channel.title: Charlie Thompson
channel.description: Public work, resume, and research notes for Charlie Thompson.

item.title: Thoughts
item.description: Separate Tweets and Posts views, with a newest-first searchable tweet archive and space for longer-form writing.

item.description: GitHub, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and email links for Charlie Thompson.

item.description: Talk context and linked Context Engine AI safety ideas map.

item.title: Public resume and work history
item.description: Minimal public resume focused on public projects and work history.

item.title: Quantum Computing and Bitcoin report
item.description: A page with an inline Dec 2025 report on quantum computing risk to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and elliptic curve cryptography.
